creator: v.haisman@sh.cvut.cz
text:
Steven Kreuzer wrote, On 9.12.2010 17:07:
> Do you  happen to have any version of binutils installed?
> 
Yes, I do. binutils-2.20.1_3. It is a dependency of many things:

pkg_delete: package 'binutils-2.20.1_3' is required by these other packages
and may not be deinstalled:
avahi-0.6.28
bitlbee-3.0_1
blas-1.0_6
farsight2-0.0.22
ffmpeg-0.6.1_1,1
gcc-4.5.2.20101125
lapack-3.3.0_1
libpurple-2.7.7
openmpi-1.4
py26-avahi-0.6.28_4
py26-gstreamer-0.10.20
py26-gtk-2.22.0_1
py26-numpy-1.5.1,1
vlc-1.1.5_2,3
x264-0.110.1804

-- 
VH
